brief_html: Requests to go to a waypoint if it was already activated.
format:
(UINT8) Waypoint ID
(UINT8) Unknown - Appears to be random
(UINT16) Unknown - 0x00
(UINT8) Level number
(UINT16) Unknown - 0x00
remarks_html:
Requests to go to a waypoint if it was already activated.

Please note: This message's official name is not known, and has been invented.
